name: clean-room
description: Clean-room reverse engineering. Phase A: read a codebase and emit strict, bounded rebuild-docs/. Phase B: an orchestrator ('the Truth') hands scoped specs to coding agents to rebuild the project 1:1 without ever seeing the original source — with context-budget handoffs (REBUILD-PROGRESS.md), a resume skill for builds too large for one context window, and a consent-gated escape hatch to pull a specific missing fact from source when the docs fall short.
